headline: Investors’ Cautious Optimism Sends Stocks to Best Week of 2026
summary: A temporary cease-fire between the U.S. and Iran helped push stocks to their best week of 2026. Despite a lackluster Friday, the Dow, S&P and Nasdaq all finished the week 3% higher or more, the biggest gains since November.

raw.headline: Investors’ Cautious Optimism Sends Stocks to Best Week of 2026
raw.summary: A temporary cease-fire between the U.S. and Iran helped push stocks to their best week of 2026. Despite a lackluster Friday, the Dow, S&P and Nasdaq all finished the week 3% higher or more, the biggest gains since November.

headline: Wall Street Builds New Tool to Bet Against Private Credit
summary: A credit-default swap index could help banks reduce exposure to private credit and let hedge funds profit from turmoil.

raw.headline: Wall Street Builds New Tool to Bet Against Private Credit
raw.summary: A credit-default swap index could help banks reduce exposure to private credit and let hedge funds profit from turmoil.

headline: Stats Perform wraps B-minus rated leveraged loan at lofty 12.35% yield
summary: Stats Perform has completed its $475 million, four-year covenant-lite term loan B at S+700, with a 0% floor and an OID of 96.5 through a Morgan Stanley-led arranger group, according to sources. The yield-to-maturity on the loan is 12.35%. Proceeds will be used to refinance the company’s existing credit facilities alongside a concurrent $275 million equity contribution from the sponsor. The company will repay a fully drawn $62 million revolver, $471 million of a covenant-lite first-lien term loan

headline: S&P 500 is back above a key level, putting stock market bulls in control: Chart of the Day
summary: The S&P 500 just reclaimed its 200-day moving average again, tilting the stock market back toward the bulls.
